desc: Exports clash results to a print-to-PDF-ready HTML report with embedded screenshots.
summary: Exports clash results to a print-to-PDF-ready HTML report with embedded screenshots. Launches the default browser so the user can print to PDF directly. Uses ReadWriteClashResultsToXml to load data and BuildSelfContainedClashReportHtml to render.
usecase: User wants a formatted PDF-style report of QA results for a coordination review.
notfor: Exporting raw data — use CSV or XML exports for that.
precondition: Active document must be saved with QA results available.

successprompts: Report saved to {path}. Browser opened — press Ctrl+P then Save as PDF.
